title: Post Third Impact
wikitext:
[]: Post Third Impact             Quote Post by King Crímson » Sat Dec 15, 2018 10:56 am What do you guys think happened after Third Impact in EoE? Did Asuka and Shinji settle each other's differences and accepted each other for who they are becoming better than what they once were? Can Kaji return? What of Seele and Gendo?. Inputs would be interesting and appreciated.

[]: Re: Post Third Impact             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Dec 16, 2018 4:33 am Since nobody else has said anything yet, here's a related thread from long ago to start the ball rolling.

[]: Re: Post Third Impact             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sun Dec 16, 2018 3:52 pm Shinji went back into Instrumentality and has been existing in a multitude of alternate dreamworld realities since then and has never left. He created the universes of Girlfriend of Steel, ANIMA, Re-TAKE, Genocide, Advice and Trust, the Sadamoto manga, and the Rebuildverse. Anno could make this reveal in Final as the ultimate commentary on how Shinji, like much of the fandom, has been unable to move on from the original series, continuously obsessing over it and trying to improve on it through semi-canon media and fanfiction. It would be the ultimate statement from him to align with his criticism that NGE was turned into an "object of dependence" among the fanbase. But of course, it probably won't happen.

Did Asuka and Shinji settle each other's differences and accepted each other for who they are becoming better than what they once were? Can Kaji return? What of Seele and Gendo?. Inputs would be interesting and appreciated.

[]: Re: Post Third Impact             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Dec 16, 2018 4:33 am Since nobody else has said anything yet, here's a related thread from long ago to start the ball rolling.

[]: Re: Post Third Impact             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sun Dec 16, 2018 3:52 pm Shinji went back into Instrumentality and has been existing in a multitude of alternate dreamworld realities since then and has never left. He created the universes of Girlfriend of Steel, ANIMA, Re-TAKE, Genocide, Advice and Trust, the Sadamoto manga, and the Rebuildverse. Anno could make this reveal in Final as the ultimate commentary on how Shinji, like much of the fandom, has been unable to move on from the original series, continuously obsessing over it and trying to improve on it through semi-canon media and fanfiction. It would be the ultimate statement from him to align with his criticism that NGE was turned into an "object of dependence" among the fanbase. But of course, it probably won't happen.
